speaker: MATT
raw_text: So, first and foremost, let's go ahead and roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So, what is that, a 3rd-level Invisibility spell?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. You guys both vanish, holding your place on top of the altar, and as that moaning tends to grow louder and louder you can see this shimmer at the doors that are open on the opposite side of the room. It looks like a woman. A form of a woman, but translucent in nature, drifting in, giving off the horrible (raspy groan) sound, as it drifts in and you see it looking around and the features are gaunt as it gets closer. It looks elven by racial nature, but the eyes are just these sunken faintly glowing sockets, the hair wild and matted and floating behind it, its hands reaching out, and as it gets partway through the temple, it looks like it's seeking something, and its eyes fall directly on you two.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm throwing a dagger right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Let's go ahead and--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ugh! What if she was a good guy?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a banshee, man.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What if it's a good banshee? Some of the banshees that I've met have been decent. We're rolling for initiative?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's Siouxsie and the Banshees, they're all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm glad I used half my spells trying to get into this goddamn place.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Off to the side there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He means well.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He means well. That's a terrible costume.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys are on the altar there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You were so prepared for me to go to the temple that you built it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I built the whole city, because I didn't know where you guys were going to go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Jesus, Matt!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He does have a pile of maps over there. MATT Shh! Don't look at it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm not looking, I'm not looking.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm just noting the pile.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So, let's go ahead and roll initiative to get the order of things here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's the mom slap, exactly! It's the grandma backhand.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, the three of you stand at the double doors. You moved around to the hallway. Is there a change to this arrangement that you would like? You currently have Grog, Vax, and Keyleth at the front, and three of you in the back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I want to stealth in behind Grog after they go into the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so there you are. I'll put you on the side of the door there. You hear the voices from the other side of the door conversing and talking back and forth. Scanlan, Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god. Someone say something cool!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's the plan?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I put my hand up in the air.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: de Rolos, roll out!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And I click my boots together. (click) Feel that adrenaline rush.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I rage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And I kick the door as hard as I can and go right in!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (scream and cheer)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (impact noise) The door swings open, both of them slamming into the sides of these two bookcases. Immediately, you see behind the desk here and standing in the center.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's Kiefer Sutherland.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You see the older gentleman in these long robes immediately spin his head and see, essentially, a troupe of armed villagers, peasants, dirty faces come rushing in. all fucked up eyes and all. Rushing into the room. They both turn, looking completely caught off-guard by this. You do also see in the room, there are a few guards that are just waiting off to the side. There's a couch area, there's a fireplace.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Of course. Damn guards.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys get a surprise round.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's right!
